title: Neophloga catatiana
taxonomy: Neophloga catatiana is a species of flowering plant in the family Commelinaceae. It is native to New Zealand. The classification of Neophloga catatiana includes its kingdom as Plantae, phylum as Liliopsida, and class as Liliopsida. Additionally, it is a member of the order Commelinales, family Commelinaceae, and genus Neophloga. More specific information about its classification may require further research.
